_metadata.name: Phishing Email Analysis
_metadata.description: Analyze suspicious emails by extracting URLs and attachments, checking them against VirusTotal for malware and phishing indicators, assessing risk, and delivering a verdict. Designed for SOC teams handling phishing reports.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Phishing Email Analysis
manifest.description: Extract, scan, and classify suspicious emails with automated threat intelligence.
manifest.author: sentris-team

data.description: Triggered when a user reports a suspicious email for analysis
Parse email headers, extract URLs, sender info, and attachment hashes

config.script: const email = input; const urlRegex = /https?:\/\/[^\s"<>]+/g; const urls = (email.body || '').match(urlRegex) || []; const senderDomain = (email.from || '').split('@')[1] || 'unknown'; return { urls, senderDomain, from: email.from, subject: email.subject, attachments: email.attachments || [], hasAttachments: (email.attachments || []).length > 0, headerAnalysis: { spf: email.headers?.spf, dkim: email.headers?.dkim, dmarc: email.headers?.dmarc } };

data.description: Check all extracted URLs against VirusTotal for malicious indicators
Query domain reputation API for the sender domain
Analyze all intelligence data and produce a phishing confidence score

config.script: const urlResults = input.urlScan || {}; const domainRep = input.domainCheck || {}; const indicators = input.extracted || {}; let score = 0; if (urlResults.malicious > 0) score += 40; if (domainRep.reputation === 'malicious') score += 30; if (!indicators.headerAnalysis?.dkim) score += 10; if (!indicators.headerAnalysis?.spf) score += 10; if (!indicators.headerAnalysis?.dmarc) score += 10; const verdict = score >= 60 ? 'phishing' : score >= 30 ? 'suspicious' : 'clean'; return { verdict, confidenceScore: score, details: { urlThreats: urlResults.malicious || 0, domainReputation: domainRep.reputation || 'unknown', authFailures: { spf: !indicators.headerAnalysis?.spf, dkim: !indicators.headerAnalysis?.dkim, dmarc: !indicators.headerAnalysis?.dmarc } } };

data.description: Send the phishing analysis verdict to the SOC team

requiredSecrets.name: virustotal_api_key
requiredSecrets.description: VirusTotal API key for URL and file scanning

requiredSecrets.name: slack_webhook_url
requiredSecrets.description: Slack webhook URL for phishing analysis results
